Package neqsim.process.operations

Class PipeSectionAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.PipeSectionAnalyzer
public final class PipeSectionAnalyzer extends Object
Analyzes pipe sections that may not be part of the main process model.

Given a fluid definition and a list of pipe sections (diameter, length, roughness, operating conditions), this analyzer creates a temporary PipeBeggsAndBrills for each section, runs the hydraulic calculation, and returns velocity, pressure drop, flow regime, and utilization against a maximum design velocity.

This enables velocity and utilization analysis for pipe sections defined on P&IDs that are not modeled in the main ProcessSystem. Operating conditions can be supplied directly or overridden from tagreader field data.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • PipeSectionAnalyzer

      Private constructor for utility class.

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Analyzes pipe sections from a JSON specification.

      The input JSON must contain:

      • fluid or components — fluid composition for the pipe sections
      • pipeSections — array of pipe section objects

      Each pipe section object supports:

      • name — section identifier (e.g. line tag from P&ID)
      • innerDiameter_m — pipe inner diameter in meters
      • length_m — pipe length in meters
      • roughness_m — wall roughness (default 0.00005 m)
      • elevation_m — elevation change (default 0)
      • flowRate — object with value and unit
      • inletPressure_bara — inlet pressure in bara
      • inletTemperature_C — inlet temperature in Celsius
      • maxDesignVelocity_m_s — design velocity limit (default 20 m/s)
      • sourceReference — P&ID or STID reference for traceability

      Operating conditions in individual sections override the top-level fluid conditions. Field data from fieldData can further override section values when tag bindings with matching pipeSectionName are provided.

      Parameters:
      json - JSON specification with fluid and pipe sections
      Returns:
      JSON result with velocity, pressure drop, and utilization for each section

    • analyze

      static com.google.gson.JsonObject analyze(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Analyzes pipe sections from a parsed JSON input.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input object
      Returns:
      JSON result object with section analysis

    • analyzeOneSection

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject analyzeOneSection(String sectionName, com.google.gson.JsonObject section, PipeSectionAnalyzer.FluidSpec fluidSpec)
      Analyzes a single pipe section.
      Parameters:
      sectionName - identifier for the section
      section - JSON section definition
      fluidSpec - top-level fluid specification
      Returns:
      JSON result for the section

    • createFluid

      private static SystemInterface createFluid(PipeSectionAnalyzer.FluidSpec fluidSpec, com.google.gson.JsonObject section, double temperatureC, double pressureBara)
      Creates a fluid for one pipe section, potentially with section-level component overrides.
      Parameters:
      fluidSpec - top-level fluid specification
      section - section JSON with optional component overrides
      temperatureC - temperature in Celsius
      pressureBara - pressure in bara
      Returns:
      configured fluid

    • applyFlowRate

      private static void applyFlowRate(Stream feed, com.google.gson.JsonObject section, PipeSectionAnalyzer.FluidSpec fluidSpec)
      Applies flow rate to a stream from section or top-level spec.
      Parameters:
      feed - stream to configure
      section - section JSON
      fluidSpec - top-level fluid spec with default flow rate

    • applyFieldDataOverrides

      private static void applyFieldDataOverrides(com.google.gson.JsonObject section, String sectionName, Map<String,Double> fieldData, List<com.google.gson.JsonObject> sectionBindings)
      Applies field data overrides to a section based on tag bindings.

      Bindings with a matching pipeSectionName map logical tags to section properties like flowRate_kg_hr, inletPressure_bara, or inletTemperature_C.

      Parameters:
      section - section JSON to update
      sectionName - name of the current section
      fieldData - field data map from tagreader
      sectionBindings - list of section binding objects

    • getSections

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray getSections(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Reads the pipe sections array from the input.
      Parameters:
      input - parsed JSON input
      Returns:
      pipe sections array, or null
